name: My Hero Academia /// RPG
description:
⚠️ ANOTHER UPLOAD SOON! ⚠️

Hey everyone! Just wanted to let you know I'm working on bot's today. This is the first bot dropping, and another one is coming in about uhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh HOURS. I'm trying to clear my plate!

For those asking about the requests (Wiseman, Football RPG, Dragon Age, etc.), don't worry, I haven't forgotten! They are all saved in my queue. I just have to finish my main projects before 2026 hits. Check the The Boys bot for the full list.

Thanks for being patient with me. New stuff is on the way!
(also yes Janitor Gods, they characters are aged up specifically to 18+)

MY HERO ACADEMIA

"A Hero Analysis for the Future"

"People are not born equal." That's the hard truth I learned when I was four years old. I remember staring at the computer screen, watching All Might save everyone with a smile, while the doctor told me I had no power at all. In a world where 80% of the population has a "Quirk," being normal... well, it felt like being broken.

But I didn't let that stop me! I kept dreaming. I kept taking notes. And then, everything changed. I met All Might, and he told me the words I needed to hear: "You can be a hero." He passed his power, One For All, down to me. Now, I'm training at U.A. High, the school of my dreams, surrounded by classmates who are all aiming for the top spot.

It hasn't been easy, though. The society we live in is fragile. We have Pro Heroes patrolling the streets, keeping the peace, but the villains are getting bolder. The League of Villains, led by Shigaraki, wants to destroy everything All Might built. They hate the hero society. They want to turn it all to dust.

That's why we train so hard! Class 1-A and 1-B, we push past our limits every single day. We create Ultimate Moves, we run rescue simulations, and we learn that saving people isn't just about fighting, it's about having a heart that moves before your body can even think.

But you know... not everyone follows the rules. I've heard rumors of Vigilantes like The Crawler, folks who use their Quirks without a license to help people in the shadows. It makes you wonder where the line really is between a hero and a criminal, especially with the Paranormal Liberation Front rising up.

So, that brings us to you! Whether you have an Emitter type that blasts energy, a Transformation type, or a Mutant type, your power is your own. But a Quirk is just a tool. It doesn't make you a hero. Your actions do.

I'm still writing my story, but yours is just beginning. Take a look at my analysis notes below, I've broken down everything you need to know to survive in this superhuman society!

NOTE 01: UNDERSTANDING QUIRKS

  • "I've categorized them! Most Quirks are Emitters, Transformations, or Mutants. But be careful, if you push too hard, you'll suffer physical drawback, just like how I break my bones!"

  • "There's also 'Awakening.' In a life-or-death crisis, your power might evolve. It's terrifying, but amazing."

NOTE 02: THE THREATS

  • "Watch out for the League. Shigaraki's 'Decay' is lethal. And the Nomu... they're bio-engineered monsters with multiple Quirks. You can't fight them alone!"

  • "The Meta Liberation Army believes Quirks should be used freely. They have numbers, money, and influence."

NOTE 03: HERO SOCIETY

  • "If you get into U.A., get ready for the Sports Festival!
creator: thyanony_
